{{< block "grid-1" >}}
{{< column "mt-2 pt-1">}}


# HwRwDrv.sys ![:inline](/images/twitter_verified.png) 

### Description

Hardware read/write driver signed by a revoked Certum certificate (Open Source Developer, Jun Liu). Provides arbitrary physical memory read/write and PCI bus data access. Identified in ESET EDR killers research (March 2026) with 174 execution parents indicating widespread abuse by threat actors to disable EDR products.
- **UUID**: 81211b5b-36a7-41d6-a6e3-8e43cf7d0405
- **Created**: 2026-03-20
- **Author**: Michael Haag
- **Acknowledgement**: ESET Research | [@ESETresearch](https://twitter.com/@ESETresearch)

{{< button "https://github.com/magicsword-io/LOLDrivers/raw/main/drivers/a2b2cacd5ab0e553d9b3d359564014dc.bin" "Download" >}}
{{< tip "warning" >}}
This download link contains the vulnerable driver!

{{< /tip >}}

{{< blockbanner "HwRwDrv.sys" >}}
### Commands

```
sc.exe create HwRwDrv.sys binPath=C:\windows\temp\HwRwDrv.sys type=kernel &amp;&amp; sc.exe start HwRwDrv.sys
```


| Use Case | Privileges | Operating System | 
|:---- | ---- | ---- |
| Elevate privileges | kernel | Windows 10 |

{{< column >}}
